news.t: Global X Expands Covered Call Suite with Launch of Dow 30 Covered Call & Growth ETF (DYLG)

holdings.infoBox: DYLG is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are The Goldman Sachs Group stock at 13.01%, Caterpillar at 11.29%, UnitedHealth Group at 4.97%, Microsoft at 4.83%, and Amgen at 4.24%.

overview.description: The Global X Dow 30 Covered Call & Growth ETF (DYLG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Cboe DJIA Half BuyWrite index. The fund tracks an index of DJIA stocks and sells one-month, at-the-money index call options on up to 50% of the value of the underlying portfolio. The fund aims to deliver monthly distributions. DYLG was launched on Jul 25, 2023 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Global X Expands Covered Call Suite with Launch of Dow 30 Covered Call & Growth ETF (DYLG)
data.text: NEW YORK, July 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Global X ETFs, the New York-based provider of exchange-traded funds (ETFs), today announced the launch of the Global X Dow 30 Covered Call & Growth ETF (DYLG). ...
